title: PM Domain Entity Field Candidate Matrix
objective: Define the candidate field matrix for the PM/work bounded domain, mapping Schema V2 carryforward concepts into canonical Project, WorkPackage, Task, Dependency, Assignment, ScheduleWindow, ExecutionIssue, and ProgressSnapshot entities.
constrained_outputs: One PM-domain field candidate matrix document under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
Explicit distinction between required, optional, derived, imported, and deferred fields
validation_steps: Confirm WorkPackage is the operating center rather than Project, WBSNode, or Apparatus
Confirm P6 fields are identified as schedule truth rather than labor truth
Confirm non-PM concerns are routed out of the field matrix
